parameters.sqlQuery:
WITH hs AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 14 DAY) AND DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 8 DAY) THEN 'prior_7d'
      WHEN date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 'last_7d'
    END AS period,
    LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) AS campaign_key,
    SUM(leads_total) AS leads,
    SUM(leads_qualified) AS sqls
  FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.hubspot_leads_module_daily`
  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 14 DAY)
  GROUP BY period, LOWER(lead_utm_campaign)
),
spend AS (
  SELECT
    channel,
    LOWER(campaign_name) AS campaign_key,
    CASE
      WHEN date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 14 DAY) AND DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 8 DAY) THEN 'prior_7d'
      WHEN date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 'last_7d'
    END AS period,
    SUM(spend) AS spend
  FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.campaigns_daily`
  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 14 DAY)
  GROUP BY channel, LOWER(campaign_name), period
)
SELECT s.channel, s.campaign_key AS campaign_name, s.period,
  ROUND(s.spend,2) AS spend,
  COALESCE(hs.leads,0) AS leads,
  COALESCE(hs.sqls,0) AS sqls,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(s.spend,NULLIF(COALESCE(hs.leads,0),0)),2) AS cpl,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(s.spend,NULLIF(COALESCE(hs.sqls,0),0)),2) AS cpql,
  0 AS deals_won,
  'compare' AS _query
FROM spend s
LEFT JOIN hs ON s.campaign_key = hs.campaign_key AND s.period = hs.period
WHERE s.period IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY s.channel, s.period

WITH hs AS (
  SELECT LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) AS campaign_key,
    SUM(leads_total) AS leads,
    SUM(leads_qualified) AS sqls
  FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.hubspot_leads_module_daily`
  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 7 DAY)
  GROUP BY LOWER(lead_utm_campaign)
),
spend AS (
  SELECT channel, LOWER(campaign_name) AS campaign_key, SUM(spend) AS spend
  FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.campaigns_daily`
  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 7 DAY)
  GROUP BY channel, LOWER(campaign_name)
)
SELECT s.channel, s.campaign_key AS campaign_name,
  ROUND(s.spend/7*30,0) AS proj_spend,
  ROUND(COALESCE(hs.leads,0)/7*30,0) AS proj_leads,
  ROUND(COALESCE(hs.sqls,0)/7*30,0) AS proj_sqls,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(s.spend/7*30,NULLIF(COALESCE(hs.sqls,0)/7*30,0)),0) AS proj_cpql,
  0 AS proj_deals,
  'forecast' AS _query
FROM spend s
LEFT JOIN hs ON s.campaign_key = hs.campaign_key
ORDER BY proj_spend DESC

WITH hs AS (
  SELECT date, LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) AS k,
    SUM(leads_total) AS leads_total,
    SUM(leads_qualified) AS leads_qualified,
    SUM(leads_disqualified) AS leads_disqualified
  FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.hubspot_leads_module_daily`
  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 14 DAY)
  GROUP BY date, LOWER(lead_utm_campaign)
)
SELECT v.channel, v.campaign_name, v.ad_name,
  ROUND(SUM(v.spend),0) AS spend_14d,
  COALESCE(SUM(hs.leads_total),0) AS leads,
  COALESCE(SUM(hs.leads_qualified),0) AS sqls,
  0 AS deals_won,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(v.spend),NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(hs.leads_total),0),0)),0) AS cpl,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(v.spend),NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(hs.leads_qualified),0),0)),0) AS cpql,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(COALESCE(SUM(hs.leads_disqualified),0),NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(hs.leads_total),0),0))*100,0) AS disq_pct,
  'ad_audit' AS _query
FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.v_ad_performance` v
LEFT JOIN hs ON v.date = hs.date AND LOWER(v.campaign_name) = hs.k
WHERE v.date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 14 DAY)
GROUP BY v.channel, v.campaign_name, v.ad_name
HAVING SUM(v.spend) >= 20
ORDER BY cpql ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 30

SELECT action_type,target_name,channel,event_date,outcome,DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),event_date,DAY) AS days_since,'monitor' AS _query FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.agent_activity_log` WHERE event_date>=DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 30 DAY) ORDER BY event_date DESC LIMIT 20

parameters.jsCode: const rows=$input.all().map(i=>i.json),compare=rows.filter(r=>r._query==='compare'),forecast=rows.filter(r=>r._query==='forecast'),audit=rows.filter(r=>r._query==='ad_audit'),monitor=rows.filter(r=>r._query==='monitor'),today=new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US',{timeZone:'Asia/Riyadh',weekday:'long',year:'numeric',month:'long',day:'numeric'});return[{json:{system:'You are Nexa, Qoyod paid media agent. Today: '+today+'. Weekly review. USD only. Slack mrkdwn.',messages:[{role:'user',content:JSON.stringify({compare,forecast,audit,monitor})}],tools:[{name:'weekly_digest',description:'Weekly digest',input_schema:{type:'object',required:['digest','actions'],properties:{digest:{type:'string'},actions:{type:'array',items:{type:'object',required:['title','description','priority'],properties:{title:{type:'string'},description:{type:'string'},priority:{type:'string',enum:['high','medium','low']},channel:{type:'string'}}}}}}}],tool_choice:{type:'any'}}}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model:'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens:6000, system:$json.system, messages:$json.messages, tools:$json.tools, tool_choice:$json.tool_choice }) }}

parameters.query:
WITH hs AS (
  SELECT lead_utm_campaign, SUM(leads_total) AS leads, SUM(leads_qualified) AS sqls
  FROM `angular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.hubspot_leads_module_daily`
  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
  GROUP BY lead_utm_campaign
), lp AS (
  SELECT destination_url, MIN(c.campaign_name) AS sample_campaign,
    SUM(c.spend) AS spend, SUM(c.clicks) AS clicks, SUM(c.impressions) AS impressions,
    SUM(COALESCE(h.leads,0)) AS leads, SUM(COALESCE(h.sqls,0)) AS sqls
  FROM `angular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.campaigns_daily` c
  LEFT JOIN hs h ON LOWER(c.campaign_name) = LOWER(h.lead_utm_campaign)
  WHERE c.date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
    AND c.destination_url IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY destination_url
)
SELECT destination_url, sample_campaign, ROUND(spend,2) AS spend_usd,
  clicks, impressions, leads, sqls,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(leads,NULLIF(clicks,0))*100,2) AS cvr_pct,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(spend,NULLIF(sqls,0)),2) AS cpql_usd
FROM lp WHERE spend > 0 ORDER BY leads DESC

WITH hs AS (

  COALESCE(SUM(hs.leads_total),0) AS leads,

HAVING SUM(v.spend) >= 20

parameters.query:
WITH hs AS (
  SELECT lead_utm_campaign, SUM(leads_total) AS leads, SUM(leads_qualified) AS sqls
  FROM `angular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.hubspot_leads_module_daily`
  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
  GROUP BY lead_utm_campaign
), lp AS (
  SELECT destination_url, MIN(c.campaign_name) AS sample_campaign,
    SUM(c.spend) AS spend, SUM(c.clicks) AS clicks, SUM(c.impressions) AS impressions,
    SUM(COALESCE(h.leads,0)) AS leads, SUM(COALESCE(h.sqls,0)) AS sqls
  FROM `angular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.campaigns_daily` c
  LEFT JOIN hs h ON LOWER(c.campaign_name) = LOWER(h.lead_utm_campaign)
  WHERE c.date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
    AND c.destination_url IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY destination_url
)
SELECT destination_url, sample_campaign, ROUND(spend,2) AS spend_usd,
  clicks, impressions, leads, sqls,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(leads,NULLIF(clicks,0))*100,2) AS cvr_pct,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(spend,NULLIF(sqls,0)),2) AS cpql_usd
FROM lp WHERE spend > 0 ORDER BY leads DESC
